package kyo.example

import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class MultiValueBindingsImpl extends MultiValueBindings:
    import MultiValueBindingsImpl.*

    def readInto(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[kyo.example.golden.ReadResult, Any] =
        val bufU8 = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[JsRawSegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[JsRawSegment], "JsRawSegment on JS", "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", "readInto").u8a
        val eofOut = KoffiFacade.outInt()
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.runAsync(facade, "readInto", js.Array[js.Any](fd, bufU8, eofOut.buf), (raw: js.Any) =>
            val retVal = raw.asInstanceOf[Int]
            kyo.example.golden.ReadResult(retVal, eofOut.read().asInstanceOf[Int] != 0)
        )
end MultiValueBindingsImpl

object MultiValueBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings")
    private val readResultKoffiType: js.Dynamic = KoffiFacade.struct("ReadResult", js.Dynamic.literal("bytesRead" -> "int".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "eof" -> "int".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_mv"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("readInto", "read_into", "int", Seq[js.Any]("int".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "void*".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "int*".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))

end MultiValueBindingsImpl
